notes: Desktop-first responsive layout. Uses flex/grid layout primitives plus a `@media (max-width: 600px)` query to stack controls vertically and shrink card sizes on mobile. Felt-table aesthetic; accent color for active hint/buttons. Disabled state on buttons uses opacity 0.45 + cursor not-allowed for clear affordance.

self_test_results.S6_A4_responsive_scaffolding: Stylesheet contains @media (max-width: 600px) and uses flex/grid for layout — pass; manually traced: at 360px width the controls wrap to single column, no horizontal scroll on critical surfaces
